A Special Surprise for Your Loved Ones

Your Memories
In
One Link

We bring together your photos, music, and messages. Send a special link to your partner — let them open it and be amazed.

Order NowHow It Works
Your link will look like this
birlikteydik.com/yourpage
Discover
Process

Only 3 Steps

01

Upload Your Photos

Send us the best shots you took together. No need to choose, just send them all.

02

Personalize It

Share your special message, music, and special date details. We prepare everything for you.

03

Share the Link

Your special link is ready in 24 hours. Send it to them with one click, let them open it and be amazed.

Special Days
Most Popular
🎂

Birthday

Story of the Special Moment

Make your partner's birthday unforgettable. Your personal page is ready to tell the story of your best moments like a cinematic movie.

💍

Anniversary

Years Spent Together

How many years, how many memories, how many laughs? Celebrate your anniversary with a growing story album.

Highly Loved
❤️

Valentine's Day

February 14 Surprise

An extraordinary surprise on the most romantic day of the year. Add custom music and your personal message to your page.

✨

First Meeting

The Day it All Began

The first glance, the first smile... A special page describing that day could be the most beautiful gift for them.

🌸

Just Because

Unconditional Love

Sometimes the most meaningful gesture is made without any special day. Perfect to say 'I thought of you'.

🌙

Good Night

Surprise Before Sleep

A memory page prepared by your own hands waiting for them when they open their phone before sleeping.

Pricing

Simple & Transparent

Introductory Special!

$8
  • ✓Up to 10 photos
  • ✓Custom message & names
  • ✓Add custom music
  • ✓6 months active link
  • ✓Password protection

Premium

$15
  • ✓Up to 32 photos
  • ✓Custom message & names
  • ✓Add custom music
  • ✓18 months active link
  • ✓Priority delivery (12 hours)
  • ✓Password protection

Premium+

  • ✓Custom message & names

  • ✓Priority delivery (12 hours)
  • ✓Password protection

Romantic Red

The Color of Love and Passion

In the warmest tone of love, my deepest feelings hidden in every beat of my heart... A passionate story adorned with romantic light bursts and hearts, where the red of love meets deep sensual shadows.
